subject: Mathematics
overall_learning_objectives: Identify basic geometry tools and their uses
Understand the concept of parallel lines in a plane
Recognize tilings and tessellations in the environment
Differentiate between regular and irregular polygons
Draw simple line segments and circles using a compass

lesson_plan.title: The Geometry Toolbox
topics_covered: Role of the straightedge (ruler) and compass
Maintaining tool precision (sharp pencils, tight hinges)
Concepts of arcs and points of intersection
student_activities: Construct a line segment of exactly 6.3 cm

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Tilings
topics_covered: Identifying shapes that fit together (squares, rectangles)
Finding patterns in floor tiles and walls
student_activities: Color a pre-drawn square grid to create a pattern

teacher_tip: Remind students that in 'Pure' construction, we don't use the markings on a ruler to measure angles; we only use the compass and straightedge!
